# Category Use Guide

## 1. SaaS
Use for:
- memberships
- gated tools
- dashboards
- subscription-based business utilities

Best first template:
- Next.js SaaS Starter

## 2. B2B
Use for:
- agency portals
- contractor portals
- multi-client dashboards
- account-based organizations

Best first template:
- B2B Multi-Tenant Starter Kit

## 3. Content Creation
Use for:
- AI video systems
- publishing workflows
- media automation
- educational clip generation

Best first template:
- Mux AI + Vercel Workflows Starter

## 4. Workflow
Use for:
- internal orchestration
- automation builders
- template automation engines

Best first template:
- Workflow Builder

## 5. Agents
Use for:
- coding agents
- task assistants
- AI operations consoles
- repo-aware automation

Best first template:
- Coding Agent Template

## 6. Crons
Use for:
- scheduled syncs
- reports
- daily brief generation
- periodic data refresh

Best first template:
- Vercel Cron Job Example

## 7. Sandbox
Use for:
- isolated code execution
- media rendering
- risky or generated-code workflows

Best first template:
- OpenAI Agents SDK + FastAPI

## 8. v0.app / v0 API
Use for:
- app generation workflows
- prompt-to-interface experiments
- website template assistants

Best first template:
- v0 Platform API Demo / v0 SDK
